title: sceptridium ternatum var. nipponicum
intro: Sceptridium ternatum var. nipponicum, also known as Japanese Rue, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Liliaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Japanese Rue is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve coughs.
